meaning: n.火腿,大腿的后部,大腿及臀部,笨拙的演员adj.过火的,做作的v.演得过火
examples: I was eating ham and Swiss cheese on rye.
Every Saturday dad made a beautiful pea and ham soup.
The Swiss cheese oozed, the ham was freshly roasted and the pork was rich and moist.
You can also indulge in creative versions containing everything from ice cream to Iberico ham and black truffle.
